label: Vintage Halftone Heist
globalPrefix: high-detail pulp print illustration, 1970s detective magazine cover energy

suspect.prefix: full-length suspect portrait, head-to-toe visible, single person, centered framing, shoes visible

evidence.prefix: single critical clue, forensic close-up tabletop shot

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blur, low quality, compression artifacts
